hook: My home had been a low-grade mess for longer than I want to admit.

scenes.voiceover: My home had been a mess for longer than I'll admit.

scenes.voiceover: Every time I opened it I just shut it again.

caption:
My home had been a low-grade mess for longer than I want to admit.

I kept meaning to deal with it and kept not dealing with it. Things piled up, I could never find what I needed, and every time I opened it I just shut it again.

Then I found a water pitcher sitting at 4.6 stars across 59,611 reviews, and it finally gave everything a place.

It runs about $28.49 and it's the first thing in a while that just worked. The home actually stays sorted now.

Comment PITCHER and I'll reply with the link.
Amazon affiliate — I earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.
